post.subject: Ace of Spades
post.body: As has been happening every other day for the past few weeks, I played cards again with chris just a few mins ago. Did pretty weel, but we have both gotten so good that we know what each other is going to do, and especially when one of us has an ACE (which means the other person has to pick up 5 cards, or put down an ACE meaning they have to then pick up 10 cards and so on). It means that we always leave our ACES until the end... and then it gets pretty tough, not very fair i guess. So i stopped playing in the middle of a game, cos its really late and i got school in the morning, plus i really gotta tidy my room here, and get some stuff ready for school. At the min he has just had to pick up 15 cards and i only have 3 cards. We will continue tomorrow!
